title: BSP Multi-Room Buildings — Stage 3 Slice
description: Building generation: split trees → room rects → per-room furniture via SpatialCompiler + partition walls with doorways. LLM emits semantic split-tree only; deterministic engine resolves transforms and wall geometry.

prompts.prompt: Build a small house with a living room, a kitchen, and a bedroom. Put a table in the living room, a stove and fridge in the kitchen, and a table in the bedroom.
Build a tiny studio apartment — just one room. Put a bed and a small table in it.
Build a house with a living room, a kitchen, and two bedrooms. Put a table in the living room, a stove and a counter in the kitchen, a bed in each bedroom.
